name: strike_ball
description: Strikes a ball toward a target goal post using the attached hockey stick.
source_code:
async def strike_ball(ball_name, goal_name):
    ball_pos = (await get_body_position(ball_name))['position']
    goal_pos = (await get_body_position(goal_name))['position']
    import numpy as np
    b = np.array(ball_pos[:2])
    g = np.array(goal_pos[:2])
    direction = (g - b) / np.linalg.norm(g - b)
    wind_up = b - direction * 0.2
    follow_through = b + direction * 0.2
    await move_to('hand', wind_up[0], wind_up[1], 0.03, duration=1000)
    await move_to('hand', follow_through[0], follow_through[1], 0.03, duration=300)
    return {'success': True}
